HGSS.520.0000:
Lance: It’s been a long time since I
last came here.\f
This is where we commemorate the
League Champions for all eternity.\f
Their courageous Pokémon are
also inducted.\f
Here today, we witnessed the rise
of a new League Champion--\f
a Trainer who feels compassion for,
and trust toward, all Pokémon.\f
A Trainer who succeeded through
perseverance and determination.\f
The new League Champion who has
all the makings of greatness!\f
[0103,0000,0000], allow me to register you
and your partners as Champions!\f
